_comment: Wang Family Village (王家村) — Wang Lin's birthplace (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L34). ~100 families (~600-800 people per CANON_RI_ECOLOGY.md 1.5). Teng Huayuan's massacre site (Timeline E13); Wang Lin returns as Soul Formation to bury the dead. Stand-in: small plains village. Final: small village with Wang family carpentry workshop, memorial shrine at massacre center.
